mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN document_status != 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS submitted_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN document_status != 'CANCELLED' AND payment_status = 'UNPAID' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS unpaid_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN document_status != 'CANCELLED' AND production_status = 'IN_PRODUCTION' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS production_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN document_status != 'CANCELLED' AND shipment_status IN ('SHIPPED', 'DELIVERED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS shipped_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN document_status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS completed_count FROM dealer_sales_document WHERE del_flag = '0' AND business_origin = 'MERCHANT' AND create_time >= #{start}

SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(currency_code, ''), 'USD') AS currency_code, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(total_amount, 0)), 0) AS amount FROM dealer_sales_document WHERE del_flag = '0' AND business_origin = 'MERCHANT' AND document_status != 'CANCELLED' AND create_time >= #{start} GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(currency_code, ''), 'USD') ORDER BY currency_code ASC

SELECT tenant_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS order_count FROM dealer_sales_document WHERE del_flag = '0' AND business_origin = 'MERCHANT' AND document_status != 'CANCELLED' AND tenant_id IN #{tenantId} GROUP BY tenant_id

SELECT 'application' AS source, apply_id AS application_id, merchant_name, company_name, contact_name, email AS primary_email, office_phone, mobile_phone, country, state, city, address_line1, address_line2, postal_code, status AS audit_status, audit_by, audit_time, reject_reason, create_time FROM sys_tenant_apply WHERE status = 'PENDING'
AND (merchant_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR contact_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY create_time DESC, apply_id DESC
